predicted_caption: Se tlatlauik kali ipan yankuik. Sekimej ipan kali. Se maseuali. Se kuauitl inauak kali. Se ojtli ipan yankuik. Miakej xoxoktik kuaumej ijtik ikampa.
english_intermediate: A pink building is on the left side of the image. There are steps leading up to the building. A person is sitting on the steps. A tree is next to the building. The road is visible on the right side of the image. Green trees are in the background.
target_caption: Se tenantsin ika ialtepetlaken kichixtok karro kaltentli, ojtenpa.
